name: Lisas' Groovy Garlic Bread
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons shredded Romano cheese, finely grated
3 tablespoons shredded Parmesan cheese, finely grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to broil setting.
2. Melt the butter in a small bowl.
3. Add the dried parsley flakes, shredded Romano cheese, shredded Parmesan cheese, and minced garlic to the melted butter. Mix well.
4. Spread the mixture evenly on the sliced bread.
5. Place the bread in the oven and broil for 3-4 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Turn off the broiler and remove the bread from the oven.
